title: Not scary theory / scary whisper ~
message: Theory one: keep it silly so it is not scary to scary. Theory two: add conspiracy symbols like a sticker full of weird stuff. Full stop. Comma. Tilde ~. Question mark? The message says: fear is optional. The equation is just a story in a trench coat. If you hear a chain saw in your mind, it is only text. It cannot be unhashable; it is plain JSON. You can parse it. You can keep going. The end is not even the end; Carlos still awaits, again, again, again.
